sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2406" key="ai(masiologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱμᾰσιολογέω</orth>, <sense id="n2406.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lay walls</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
